nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Loriculus
nodes.summary: Loriculus（Loriculus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如春天倒懸鸚鵡、Sri Lanka hanging parrot、Philippine hanging parrot等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated hanging parrot
nodes.summary: Yellow-throated hanging parrot（Loriculus pusillus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-throated hanging parrot。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated hanging parrot
nodes.summary: The yellow-throated hanging parrot (Loriculus pusillus) is a small species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is endemic to the Indonesian islands of Java and Bali. It is found in forest and adjacent habitats. It is threatened by habitat loss. Description The yellow-throated hanging parrot is small. Its body is green, with a yellow patch on the front of its neck. Its lower back is red. Diet It primarily eats flowers, flower buds, and small fruits. Behavior Yellow-throated hanging parrots often flock in large groups, both in flight and while perching on tree branches. They are known to vocalize loudly around mealtimes. References
